chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 606 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.07.2020 For orders on MA 2933/20 For orders on office objection For orders on MA 2934/20 For orders on MA 2935/20 For hearing of main case Mr. Agha Ghulam Abbas, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, Deputy Attorney General 1. Urgency application is granted. 2to5. The Petitioner is a Consumer of Respondents / HESCO / WAPDA under Reference No. 1037111-0520600U and he is aggrieved by the alleged detection imposed by the Respondents on him. Against that he approached the Electric Inspector / Respondent No.6 under Section 26 of Electricity Act, 1910 on 10.6.2020. The grievance of the Petitioner is that the Electric Inspector / Respondent No.6 has not initiated on his said Application. Learned counsel submits that he would be satisfied and will not press this Petition if directions are given to Respondent No.6 to decide his Application expeditiously. Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan, Deputy Attorney General present in court in other matters waives notice and records no objection to the proposal of learned counsel for the Petitioner. Accordingly, we dispose of this Petition by directing Respondent No.6 to decide the Application of the Petitioner expeditiously and preferably within a period of thirty days after hearing all concerned in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
